message:
fix(distributed): thread explicit Time through snapshot and sync paths

create_snapshot hardcoded Time::ZERO for the snapshot timestamp,
making all snapshots appear to have been created at epoch zero
regardless of when they were actually taken.  Similarly,
upgrade_to_distributed did not accept a time parameter, leaving
last_sync_time stale after the upgrade.

Fix: both create_snapshot and upgrade_to_distributed now take an
explicit now: Time argument that is threaded through to the snapshot
and sync state.  All call sites (bridge.rs, federation.rs,
e2e_distributed.rs, fabric_e2e.rs) updated to pass real timestamps.

Tests updated to pass specific Time values and assert that snapshot
timestamps and last_sync_time reflect the provided time rather than
defaulting to zero.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
